title: Consistent
description: This Resourcepack enhances and adds a correct consistency to your minecraft!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9250a099eab9e841ee298d9c38cc34cd8c76a6b0.png)
**Enhance your minecraft with the consistency!**

---
This Resourcepack tries to change the minecraft vanilla textures with consistency and adding some variation to texture blocks.

![Alpha 1.3 Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26e76b43b3338f00e664ed054370b1e26469ba17.png)

![Also in Courseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d594187e0a18248a9c6830c1e2e81a445865edd.png)

[CourseforgeVersion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/consistent)
